column1: Certainly. Here is an integrated, chronological overview of the major Kabbalah systems, their key texts, and the development of the Tree of Life (Sefirot) concept, including its ancient antecedents in Babylonian, Assyrian, and Egyptian cultures (Djed pillar, Asherah tree, sacred trees). Each entry includes era, location, tradition, key figures/texts, and connection to the Tree of Life.
